items: BTC rejected at $69.3k, now $65-66k range. Risk: potential slip to $60k if support breaks.
Meme coin sentiment mixed: DOGE bullish as high-beta play post-ETF legislation. Others (PEPE, DOGE clones) sliding.
Market liquidity improving, renewed interest in meme assets. Strong macro tailwind for category if BTC stabilizes above $65k.
